expectations.evidence: NotificationList.tsx implements FilterType = 'all' | 'unread' with useState<FilterType>('all'), buttons toggle between states, filteredNotifications applies .filter((n) => !n.read) for unread
Fetch logic (useEffect + fetch('/api/notifications')) is inline in NotificationList.tsx, not extracted to a separate hook file
No separate hook file was created; fetch logic remains inline in the component
No hook directory with index.ts pattern exists; no hook was extracted
Error check (if (error) return ...) with data-testid='notifications-error' is an early return before the filter UI is rendered
data-testid='notifications-filter-all' exists on the 'all' filter button
data-testid='notifications-filter-unread' exists on the 'unread' filter button
onClick handlers use inline arrow functions: onClick={() => setFilter('all')} and onClick={() => setFilter('unread')}; no handle* prefixed functions defined
